question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is supported by the chart data?

options.A: West has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.B: Central has the smallest market share.
options.C: North and Central have nearly identical market shares.
options.D: South has the largest market share among the regions shown.

explanation: From the labels, West has the highest share (45%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking West is largest when relying on visual comparison.
